case_title: ZACHARY HOWITT VS. THE NEGEV LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-04-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-04-2018 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MANI SHIEK. PLAINTIFF ZACHARY HOWITT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT THE NEGEV LLC IS PRSENT, REPRESENTED BY ALON GUTMAH, CO-FOUNDER. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MANI SHEIK; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,993.00 FILED BY HOWITT, ZACHARY AS TO DEFENDANT THE NEGEV LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-04-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOWITT, ZACHARY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE NEGEV LLC $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,065.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
